creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
A few paper cuts were encountered whilst copying from online manual pages, to <https://wiki.freebsd.org/Sound#Manual_Pages>. 

Each of the one lines below NAME in the following pages includes at least one tab that should be a normal space: 

<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=snd_cs4281&sektion=4&manpath=FreeBSD>

<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=snd_csa&sektion=4&manpath=FreeBSD>

<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=snd_fm801&sektion=4&manpath=FreeBSD>

<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=snd_gusc&sektion=4&manpath=FreeBSD>

<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=snd_ich&sektion=4&manpath=FreeBSD>

<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=snd_maestro&sektion=4&manpath=FreeBSD>
